channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: 2026’s Breaches Proved One Thing: Compliance ≠ Security
item.description: In 2026, 88% of breaches exploited misconfigured trust boundaries after initial compromise—learn the fixes that cut dwell time from 204 days to 2.3 hours. Compliance ≠ security: SOC 2, ISO 27001, and PCI DSS reports failed to stop 3.8 billion customer records from leaking in the Snowflake breach.

item.title: 12 lessons startups learn too late (and how to unlearn them)
item.description: Cut user churn by 15% and reduce MTTR by 85% with these 12 production lessons startups learn too late — latency percentiles, connection pooling, staging realism, and more. Learn from real failures in Nairobi, Jakarta, and São Paulo.

item.title: Why my phone’s Wi‑Fi keeps dropping when I’m on public hotspots (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut captive-portal stalls by 68% with Wi‑Fi scan throttling and BSSID locking — tested on Android 14 and iOS 17 across $200 and $700 phones.

item.title: The 11 scaling steps no solo dev talks about
item.description: Cut API response time by 75% and hosting cost by 80% using 11 scaling steps solo devs actually need — pagination, async queues, CDN moves, and when to swap SQLite for PostgreSQL.

item.title: How we went from 300ms to 12ms writes on Ethereum with calldata compression
item.description: Cut Ethereum calldata writes from 3,100 bytes to 1,860 bytes with zlib compression, reducing confirmation time from 18 seconds to 1.2 seconds and halving gas costs — plus the on-chain zlib address and fallback code you need.

item.title: How Stripe Uses Idempotency Keys vs Exactly-Once Queues to Avoid Lost Payments
item.description: Process 1.7 billion requests/day with 280ms median latency — idempotency keys vs exactly-once queues compared for solo founders. Learn which pattern prevents lost payments and scales to 10K req/day without hiring an SRE.

item.title: Python 3.13 in 2026: Build a real-time API with 9ms latency
item.description: Build a real-time Python 3.13 API with 9ms latency using FastAPI and a local LLM — verified benchmarks, Dockerfile, and observability tips that cut memory by 29% and cold starts by 45%.

item.title: iTerm2 vs Warp: Terminals for Speed and Sanity
item.description: Cut tab switching latency from 110ms to 35ms and reduce RAM usage from 600MB to 180MB with Warp vs iTerm2 — compare stability, SSH speed, and AI command suggestions to pick the right terminal for your workflow.

item.title: Why AI-generated personalized study plans stall at 100 users (and how to scale to 1M)
item.description: Cut personalized study plan latency from 6.8s to 420ms at 1M users — with exact Redis configs, connection pooling, and Kubernetes tuning — and prevent the cache storm that kills edtech platforms before Series A.

item.title: Algorithm Optimization: Practical Big O Analysis: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut Algorithm Optimization: Practical Big O Analysis failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, an…

item.title: How we raised our starting offers by 25% with one spreadsheet
item.description: Raised starting offers by 25% with one spreadsheet — market data failed, but a Risk Ledger linking power outages to unpaid overtime worked. Uptime rose from 82% to 96% in six months.

item.title: The Tech Industry's Mental Health Crisis: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut The Tech Industry's Mental Health Crisis failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, and a step…

item.title: TypeScript patterns that cut bugs by 60% in 3 months
item.description: Cut production bugs by 62% and rollbacks by 75% with TypeScript branded types, per-service validation, and enforced immutability — measurement steps included for Jakarta and Dublin teams.

item.title: 12 best AI agents in 2025 ranked by real use cases
item.description: Cut agent development time by 60% with 12 production-ready AI agent frameworks ranked by real use cases — latency, cost, and failure rate benchmarks included for Lagos, London, Manila, and Montreal teams.

item.title: Top-down vs Bottom-up: Two Ways to Read Code
item.description: Cut new-hire onboarding time by 60% with a top-down code reading strategy — architecture maps, READMEs, and the mistakes that waste days debugging legacy code.

item.title: Supabase in Production: One Query to Rule Them All
item.description: pike from 12% to 87% when the pool tipped o with Supabase Production One Query — Supabase and watched our p95 latency jump from 32ms.

item.title: Why Event-Driven Architecture Fails with Duplicate Events (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut duplicate event processing by 99.8% in production with idempotency keys, Redis, and Kafka EOS — real fixes with metrics, code, and escalation paths for event-driven systems under load.

item.title: Low-Code Platforms Are Killing Your Career (Here’s Why)
item.description: Cut low-code app response time from 5.8s to 200ms by replacing auto-generated queries and self-hosting the backend — specific fixes for Retool, Appsmith, and Power Apps plus verification metrics and CI budgets.

item.title: We monitored our app before users complained — here’s what worked
item.description: Cut user-reported issues by 88% with proactive monitoring — Prometheus alerts, synthetic checks, and a focus on user flows instead of infrastructure metrics

item.title: Run your own AI assistant for under $5/month — the real stack
item.description: AI assistant under month: if CPU > 80% for 30 seconds, preventing ca. Practical guide with real examples.
